audit_items.proof_trace: The probe function uses the classic Linux kernel goto-unwind pattern with correctly ordered labels (err_irqs_disable → err_unmap_rx → err_unmap_tx → err_netdev_free → err_ctrl_unmap → err_pci_regions → err_pci_disable → err_free_vf). Combined BAR mapping (vf->q_bar != NULL) vs. non-combined is handled symmetrically at every label via the `if (!vf->q_bar)` guards, and nfp_netvf_pci_remove mirrors all allocations. No allocation is orphaned on any error path.
